subject: Castform Snowy Form, a small round white Pokemon with a snowflake-cloud head formation, floating in a snowy blizzard scene
description: A small spherical white creature floats near center frame, its head topped with a rounded snow-cloud formation that gives it a distinctly winter character. The body is soft white, nearly blending with the snowy environment surrounding it. The background is pale lavender-blue with swirling snow or frost patterns, consistent with a blizzard or hailstorm setting. The creature appears cheerful and weightless, hovering in the icy air. The overall palette is cool and wintry — white, lavender, and light blue dominating throughout.
foreground: Castform Snowy Form hovering, white rounded body with cloud-dome head
background: swirling snow and blizzard patterns, pale lavender-blue sky
